StatusUnit.Name: IDLE
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 检测程序.Field.Bdouble254=28000; 检测程序.Field.Bdouble255=43000;

StatusUnit.Name: PRESTART
检测启动
全部点亮

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 产品1-Nsl21912.Method.LedAffOff(); IN4301000230.Part.设置黄光iout=1;
StatusUnit.Name: 单数点亮
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 产品1-Nsl21912.Method.LedAffOff(); IN4301000230.Part.设置黄光iout=1;

StatusUnit.Name: 双数点亮

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4301000230.Part.检测结束=0;
StatusUnit.Name: 判断是否ok
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4301000230.Part.检测结束=0;

StatusUnit.Name: ng

StatusUnit.Name: 结束测试
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4301000230.Part.产品01-开始检测=1;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 电阻采集.Field.CurrentMaxReadRegCount=10; 电阻采集.Method.JXReadDataDev1();

StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 电阻采集.Field.CurrentMaxReadRegCount=10; 电阻采集.Method.JXReadDataDev1();

StatusUnit.Name: 黄光全部点亮

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 产品1-Nsl21912.Method.LedAffOff(); IN4301000230.Part.设置白光iout=1;

StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 产品1-Nsl21912.Method.LedAffOff(); IN4301000230.Part.设置白光iout=1;

StatusUnit.Name: 黄光双数点亮

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4301000230.Part.产品08-检测OK=0; IN4301000230.Part.产品08-检测NG=1;
StatusUnit.Name: 判断结果
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4301000230.Part.产品08-检测OK=0; IN4301000230.Part.产品08-检测NG=1;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4301000230.Part.打标允许=0; IN4301000230.Part.检测结束=0;
StatusUnit.Name: PRESTART
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4301000230.Part.打标允许=0; IN4301000230.Part.检测结束=0;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4301000230.Part.打标允许=1;
StatusUnit.Name: 打标开始
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4301000230.Part.打标允许=1;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4301000230.Part.打标允许=0;
StatusUnit.Name: 打标更新
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4301000230.Part.打标允许=0;

StatusUnit.Name: 打标是否更新

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 盖板上方扫码枪.Method.ConnectBarcodeScanner(192.168.1.46:502);
StatusUnit.Name: IDLE
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 盖板上方扫码枪.Method.ConnectBarcodeScanner(192.168.1.46:502);

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 检测程序.Method.Sleep(500);
StatusUnit.Name: 扫码结束
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 检测程序.Method.Sleep(500);

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码启动=0;
StatusUnit.Name: 扫描到二维码
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码启动=0;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 盖板下方扫码枪.Method.ConnectBarcodeScanner(192.168.1.72:502);
StatusUnit.Name: IDLE
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 盖板下方扫码枪.Method.ConnectBarcodeScanner(192.168.1.72:502);

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 检测程序.Method.Sleep(500);
StatusUnit.Name: 扫码结束
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 检测程序.Method.Sleep(500);

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码启动=0;
StatusUnit.Name: 扫描到二维码
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码启动=0;

StatusUnit.Name: IDLE

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4301000230.Part.内部扫码光源=3;
StatusUnit.Name: 收到扫码启动信号
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4301000230.Part.内部扫码光源=3;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 内部海康扫码枪.Method.ExecuteBarcodeScan(1,1);
StatusUnit.Name: 到位置1扫码
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 内部海康扫码枪.Method.ExecuteBarcodeScan(1,1);

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4301000230.Part.终检扫码完成=1;
StatusUnit.Name: 扫码完成
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4301000230.Part.终检扫码完成=1;

StatusUnit.Name: 码枪设置

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 内部海康扫码枪.Field.ClientReceive=;
StatusUnit.DuringNote: 内部海康扫码枪.Method.ClientWriteHex(3C5365742C557365724375722C313E); 检测程序.Method.Sleep(3000);
StatusUnit.Name: 码枪连接
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 内部海康扫码枪.Field.ClientReceive=;
StatusUnit.DuringFunction: 内部海康扫码枪.Method.ClientWriteHex(3C5365742C557365724375722C313E); 检测程序.Method.Sleep(3000);

StatusUnit.Name: 设置白光
设置黄光
IDLE
到位置1扫码
到位置2扫码

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 外部海康扫码枪.Field.ClientReceive=;
StatusUnit.DuringNote: 外部海康扫码枪.Method.ClientWriteHex(3C5365742C557365724375722C313E); 检测程序.Method.Sleep(3000);
StatusUnit.Name: 码枪设置
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 外部海康扫码枪.Field.ClientReceive=;
StatusUnit.DuringFunction: 外部海康扫码枪.Method.ClientWriteHex(3C5365742C557365724375722C313E); 检测程序.Method.Sleep(3000);

StatusUnit.Name: 码枪连接
开机先扫上盖板
开机先扫下盖板

StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码合格=1;

StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 外部载盘扫码枪.Method.ConnectBarcodeScanner(192.168.1.41:502);

StatusUnit.Name: IDLE

StatusUnit.Name: 启动
连接PLC
连接单片机
连接CCD相机
初始化状态
连接仪器

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4301000230.Part.气缸控制=0; 检测程序.Method.Sleep(1000);
StatusUnit.Name: 测试结束
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4301000230.Part.气缸控制=0; 检测程序.Method.Sleep(1000);

StatusUnit.Name: 检测ok
检测ng
复位信号

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4301000230.Part.气缸控制=2; 检测程序.Method.Sleep(1250);
StatusUnit.Name: 气缸工作
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4301000230.Part.气缸控制=2; 检测程序.Method.Sleep(1250);

StatusUnit.Name: 测试启动

Condition.Name: PRESTART_检测启动
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4301000230.Part.开始检测==1&& 电阻采集.Field.IsJxPrepared==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4301000230.Part.开始检测==1&& 电阻采集.Field.IsJxPrepared==1&&

Condition.Name: 全部点亮_黄光全部点亮
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.设置黄光iout==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.设置黄光iout==0&&

Condition.Name: 黄光全部点亮_单数点亮
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.设置白光iout==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.设置白光iout==0&&

Condition.Name: 单数点亮_黄光单数点亮
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.设置黄光iout==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.设置黄光iout==0&&

Condition.Name: 黄光单数点亮_双数点亮
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.设置白光iout==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.设置白光iout==0&&

Condition.Name: 双数点亮_黄光双数点亮
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.设置黄光iout==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.设置黄光iout==0&&

Condition.Name: 黄光双数点亮_结束测试
地址测试_全部点亮
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.设置白光iout==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.设置白光iout==0&&

Condition.Name: 判断R5_R5
Condition.ConditionFunction: 电阻采集.Field.R5>=检测程序.Field.Bdouble254&& 电阻采集.Field.R5<=检测程序.Field.Bdouble255&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 电阻采集.Field.R5>=检测程序.Field.Bdouble254&& 电阻采集.Field.R5<=检测程序.Field.Bdouble255&&

Condition.Name: 判断R2_R2
Condition.ConditionFunction: 电阻采集.Field.R2>=检测程序.Field.Bdouble254&& 电阻采集.Field.R2<=检测程序.Field.Bdouble255&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 电阻采集.Field.R2>=检测程序.Field.Bdouble254&& 电阻采集.Field.R2<=检测程序.Field.Bdouble255&&

Condition.Name: 判断R1_R1
Condition.ConditionFunction: 电阻采集.Field.R1>=检测程序.Field.Bdouble254&& 电阻采集.Field.R1<=检测程序.Field.Bdouble255&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 电阻采集.Field.R1>=检测程序.Field.Bdouble254&& 电阻采集.Field.R1<=检测程序.Field.Bdouble255&&

Condition.Name: 判断R4_R4
Condition.ConditionFunction: 电阻采集.Field.R4>=检测程序.Field.Bdouble254&& 电阻采集.Field.R4<=检测程序.Field.Bdouble255&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 电阻采集.Field.R4>=检测程序.Field.Bdouble254&& 电阻采集.Field.R4<=检测程序.Field.Bdouble255&&

Condition.Name: 判断R5_判断R2
Condition.ConditionFunction: 电阻采集.Field.R5<检测程序.Field.Bdouble254|| 电阻采集.Field.R5>检测程序.Field.Bdouble255||
Condition.ConditionNote: 电阻采集.Field.R5<检测程序.Field.Bdouble254|| 电阻采集.Field.R5>检测程序.Field.Bdouble255||

Condition.Name: 判断R2_判断R1
Condition.ConditionFunction: 电阻采集.Field.R2<检测程序.Field.Bdouble254|| 电阻采集.Field.R2>检测程序.Field.Bdouble255||
Condition.ConditionNote: 电阻采集.Field.R2<检测程序.Field.Bdouble254|| 电阻采集.Field.R2>检测程序.Field.Bdouble255||

Condition.Name: 判断R4_地址测试
Condition.ConditionFunction: 电阻采集.Field.R4<检测程序.Field.Bdouble254|| 电阻采集.Field.R4>检测程序.Field.Bdouble255||
Condition.ConditionNote: 电阻采集.Field.R4<检测程序.Field.Bdouble254|| 电阻采集.Field.R4>检测程序.Field.Bdouble255||

判断结果_CHECKEND

Condition.Name: 准备开始检测_判断结果
判断结果_CHECKEND
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4102007879005.Para.产品05-载盘二维码==TRUE&& PR4102007879005.Para.产品05-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-L-二维码==TRUE&& PR4102007879005.Para.产品05-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-L-白光全亮-相机3==TRUE&& PR4102007879005.Para.产品05-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-L-白光双数点亮-相机3==TRUE&& PR4102007879005.Para.产品05-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-L-黄光全亮-相机3==TRUE&& PR4102007879005.Para.产品05-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-L-黄光双数点亮-相机3==TRUE&&

判断结果_CHECKEND
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4102007879006.Para.产品06-载盘二维码==TRUE&& PR4102007879006.Para.产品06-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-R-二维码==TRUE&& PR4102007879006.Para.产品06-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-R-白光全亮-相机3==TRUE&& PR4102007879006.Para.产品06-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-R-白光双数点亮-相机3==TRUE&& PR4102007879006.Para.产品06-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-R-黄光全亮-相机3==TRUE&& PR4102007879006.Para.产品06-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-R-黄光双数点亮-相机3==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4102007879006.Para.产品06-载盘二维码==TRUE&& PR4102007879006.Para.产品06-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-R-二维码==TRUE&& PR4102007879006.Para.产品06-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-R-白光全亮-相机3==TRUE&& PR4102007879006.Para.产品06-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-R-白光双数点亮-相机3==TRUE&& PR4102007879006.Para.产品06-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-R-黄光全亮-相机3==TRUE&& PR4102007879006.Para.产品06-DRL-PSTN-TURN-ASSY3-R-黄光双数点亮-相机3==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: 准备开始检测_判断结果
准备开始检测_判断结果
打标更新_打标是否更新
打标是否更新_打标开始
扫码结束_上盖板二维码正确
扫码结束_PRESTART
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码结束判定=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码结束判定=0;

Condition.Name: 扫描到二维码_扫码结束
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码结束判定==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码结束判定==1&&

Condition.Name: 扫码结束_下盖板二维码正确
扫码结束_PRESTART
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码结束判定=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码结束判定=0;

Condition.Name: 扫描到二维码_扫码结束
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码结束判定==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码结束判定==1&&

Condition.Name: PRESTART_收到扫码启动信号
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4301000230.Part.内部扫码气缸-0在里面-1在外面=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4301000230.Part.内部扫码气缸-0在里面-1在外面=0;

Condition.Name: 收到扫码启动信号_到位置1扫码
到位置1扫码_到位置2扫码
扫码完成_PRESTART
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4301000230.Part.终检扫码完成=0; IN4301000230.Part.内部扫码光源=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4301000230.Part.终检扫码完成=0; IN4301000230.Part.内部扫码光源=0;

Condition.Name: PRESTART_到位置1扫码
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4301000230.Part.双手启动处开始扫产品二维码==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4301000230.Part.双手启动处开始扫产品二维码==1&&

Condition.Name: 到位置1扫码_到位置2扫码
到位置2扫码_PRESTART
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& 外部海康扫码枪.Field.IsGetBar==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& 外部海康扫码枪.Field.IsGetBar==1&&
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4301000230.Part.双手启动处开始扫产品二维码=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4301000230.Part.双手启动处开始扫产品二维码=0;

Condition.Name: 码枪连接_PRESTART
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.自动运行启动==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.自动运行启动==1&&

Condition.Name: CHECKFAIL_开机先扫上盖板
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码合格==0&& IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码结束判定==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码合格==0&& IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码结束判定==0&&

Condition.Name: 开机先扫上盖板_判断上盖板二维码
判断上盖板二维码_上盖板二维码正确
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码结束判定=1;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码结束判定=1;

Condition.Name: 上盖板二维码正确_开机先扫下盖板
判断下盖板二维码_下盖板二维码正确
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4102007879000.Para.盖板上方二维码==TRUE&& PR4102007879000.Para.盖板下方二维码==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4102007879000.Para.盖板上方二维码==TRUE&& PR4102007879000.Para.盖板下方二维码==TRUE&&
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码结束判定=1;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码结束判定=1;

Condition.Name: CHECKFAIL_开机先扫下盖板
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码合格==1&& IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码合格==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码合格==1&& IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码合格==0&&

Condition.Name: 扫码完成_PRESTART
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4301000230.Part.扫码完成=0; IN4301000230.Part.前道产品扫码完成=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4301000230.Part.扫码完成=0; IN4301000230.Part.前道产品扫码完成=0;

Condition.Name: CHECKFAIL_扫码NG重新扫码
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码合格==1&& IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码合格==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码合格==1&& IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码合格==1&&

Condition.Name: 收到扫码启动信号_扫码结束判定载盘二维码
Condition.TargetSuName: 扫码结束判定载盘二维码
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4301000230.Part.双手启动处开始扫载盘二维码==0&& IN4301000230.Part.双手启动处开始扫产品二维码==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4301000230.Part.双手启动处开始扫载盘二维码==0&& IN4301000230.Part.双手启动处开始扫产品二维码==0&&

Condition.Name: 扫码结束判定载盘二维码_CHECKEND
Condition.SourceSuName: 扫码结束判定载盘二维码
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4102007879000.Para.盖板上方二维码==TRUE&& PR4102007879000.Para.盖板下方二维码==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4102007879000.Para.盖板上方二维码==TRUE&& PR4102007879000.Para.盖板下方二维码==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: 开机先扫下盖板_判断下盖板二维码
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码启动==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码启动==0&&

Condition.Name: PRESTART_扫码
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4301000230.Part.双手启动处开始扫载盘二维码==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4301000230.Part.双手启动处开始扫载盘二维码==1&&

Condition.Name: 扫码_PRESTART
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& 外部载盘扫码枪.Field.GetBarcodeLength>0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& 外部载盘扫码枪.Field.GetBarcodeLength>0&&
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4301000230.Part.双手启动处开始扫载盘二维码=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4301000230.Part.双手启动处开始扫载盘二维码=0;

Condition.Name: 启动_PRESTART
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.胎具匹配==1&& IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码合格==1&& IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码合格==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.胎具匹配==1&& IN4301000230.Part.盖板上方扫码合格==1&& IN4301000230.Part.盖板下方扫码合格==1&&

Condition.Name: 测试结束_检测ok
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4301000230.Part.载盘测试结果OK==1&& IN4301000230.Part.载盘测试结果NG==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4301000230.Part.载盘测试结果OK==1&& IN4301000230.Part.载盘测试结果NG==0&&

Condition.Name: 测试结束_检测ng
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4301000230.Part.载盘测试结果OK==0&& IN4301000230.Part.载盘测试结果NG==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4301000230.Part.载盘测试结果OK==0&& IN4301000230.Part.载盘测试结果NG==1&&

Condition.Name: 检测ok_复位信号
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.检测启动==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.检测启动==0&&

Condition.Name: 检测ng_复位信号
Condition.ConditionFunction: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.检测启动==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: 检测程序.Field.EqualTrue==1&& IN4301000230.Part.检测启动==0&&
